name: real3d-flipbook
description: Premium Responsive Real 3D FlipBook & PDF Viewer for WordPress

scripts.build: npm run minify:js && npm run minify:css
scripts.minify:js: for f in js/flipbook.js js/flipbook.webgl.js js/flipbook.book3.js js/flipbook.scroll.js js/flipbook.swipe.js; do npx terser "$f" --compress --mangle -o "${f%.js}.min.js"; done
